messages.content: 对下面文字进行总结，要求字数500字。A PHP object injection (POI) vulnerability is a security-critical bug that allows the remote code execution of class methods existing in a vulnerable PHP application. Exploiting this vulnerability often requires sophisticated property-oriented programming to shape an injection object. Existing off-the-shelf tools focus only on identifying potential POI vulnerabilities without confirming the presence of any exploit objects. To this end, we propose FUGIO, the first automatic exploit generation (AEG) tool for POI vulnerabilities. FUGIO conducts coarse-grained static and dynamic program analyses to generate a list of gadget chains that serve as blueprints for exploit objects. FUGIO then runs fuzzing campaigns using these identified chains and produces exploit objects. FUGIO generated 68 exploit objects from 30 applications containing known POI vulnerabilities with zero false positives. FUGIO also found two previously unreported POI vulnerabilities with five exploits, demonstrating its efficacy in generating functional exploits.

A PHP object injection vulnerability can lead to the remote code execution of class methods in a vulnerable PHP application. Existing tools only identify potential vulnerabilities without confirming the presence of any exploit objects. FUGIO, an automatic exploit generation tool, is proposed to generate exploit objects for POI vulnerabilities. FUGIO uses static and dynamic program analyses to generate gadget chains, which act as blueprints for exploit objects, and runs fuzzing campaigns to produce exploits. FUGIO generated 68 exploit objects from 30 applications with no false positives and discovered two previously unreported vulnerabilities with five exploits.

PHP对象注入（POI）漏洞是一种安全批次，允许攻击者利用存在漏洞的PHP应用程序中的类方法进行远程代码执行。利用此漏洞通常需要使用复杂的面向属性编程来构建注入对象。现有的现成工具仅专注于识别潜在的POI漏洞，而没有确认任何利用对象的存在。因此，我们提出了FUGIO，这是首个用于POI漏洞的自动利用生成(AEG)工具。FUGIO使用粗粒度的静态和动态程序分析来生成提供作为利用对象蓝图的小工具链清单。然后，FUGIO使用这些已识别的链进行fuzzing攻击，并生成利用对象。FUGIO从包含已知POI漏洞的30个应用程序中生成了68个利用对象，且无误报。FUGIO还发现了两个以前未报告的POI漏洞，有五个利用效果，证明了FUGIO在生成实用利用方面的有效性。

【文献综述】自动化漏洞利用生成对PHP注入漏洞的应用

随着互联网应用的不断发展，Web应用程序的重要性日益增强。然而，Web应用程序中的安全漏洞也越来越频繁地被利用，给信息安全带来了极大的威胁。PHP是互联网应用程序中广泛使用的编程语言，常常为恶意攻击者提供了可利用的漏洞入口。其中，PHP对象注入(POI)漏洞是一种常见的安全漏洞，允许攻击者远程执行存在漏洞的PHP应用程序中的类方法。

自动化漏洞利用生成(AEG)是一种自动化技术，用于通过分析应用程序的行为和结构来生成利用漏洞的恶意代码。对于PHP注入漏洞来说，现有的自动化工具仅能识别潜在的漏洞，但无法确认漏洞是否存在可利用的注入对象。于是，研究人员提出了FUGIO，这是首个用于POI漏洞的自动利用生成工具。

FUGIO使用静态和动态程序分析来生成即将用于注入的小工具链清单。通过这些小工具链，FUGIO可以生成可利用的注入对象，并使用fuzzing攻击来生成实用的利用代码。研究证明，FUGIO可以从含有已知POI漏洞的30个应用程序中生成68个利用对象，且无误报。 FUGIO还可以发现之前未被报告的注入漏洞，同时生成相应的利用代码。

这项研究的贡献在于，FUGIO不仅可以识别注入漏洞，而且可以自动生成利用代码，而无需人为干预。此外，FUGIO在POI漏洞的利用方面表现出良好的效能，能够发现新的漏洞和生成新的利用代码。

然而，这项技术仍存在一些局限性。由于FUGIO是基于静态和动态程序分析的，因此当程序在运行时具有不确定性时，FUGIO可能会错误地生成利用代码。此外，当程序过于复杂时，FUGIO的运行时间可能会显著延长。因此，研究人员需要进一步完善FUGIO的技术，以提高其准确性和效率。

总之，自动化漏洞利用生成技术在信息安全领域的应用前景广阔。此项研究为这一领域的发展提供了一个重要的样本，表明了通过自动化技术生成利用某些复杂漏洞的恶意代码的可能性。

翻译为中文。The article Automatic Image Annotation based on Co-Training[3] points out that training a well-performing model usually requires a large number of labeled samples, and manual annotation is costly, so a new semi-supervised automatic image annotation method based on a co-training algorithm is proposed, which can utilize both labeled and The performance is improved by constructing two different classifiers using the co-training method, and the experimental results show that the method has better labeling performance than many existing automatic image standard methods.
文章《基于协同训练的自动图像注释》[3]指出，训练一个表现良好的模型通常需要大量带标签的样本，而手动标注成本高昂，因此提出了一种新的基于半监督协同训练算法的自动图像注释方法，可以利用带标签和不带标签的样本，通过构建两个不同的分类器来提高性能。实验结果表明，该方法的标注性能比现有许多自动图像标准方法要好。

总结下段文字并生成一段文献综述。In recent years there is a surge of serialization-based vulnerabilities in web applications which have led to serious incidents, exposing private data of millions of individuals. Although there have been some efforts in addressing this problem, there is still no unified solution that is able to detect implementation-agnostic vulnerabilities. We aim to fill this gap by proposing ObjectMap, an extendable tool for the detection of deserialization and object injection vulnerabilities in Java and PHP based web applications. Furthermore, we also introduce the first deserialization test environment which can be used to test deserialization vulnerability detection tools and for educational purposes. Both of these tools are easily extendable and the first to implement this combination of features to the best of our knowledge and they bring together a synthesis of cross-complementing functionalities that are able to ignite further research in the field and help in the development of more feature-rich solutions.

在最近几年中，Web应用程序中的基于序列化的漏洞增加了，这些漏洞导致了严重的事件，暴露了数百万个人的私人数据。尽管在解决此问题方面已经进行了一些努力，但仍然没有统一的解决方案能够检测实现无关的漏洞。该研究通过提出ObjectMap，提供了一种可扩展工具，用于检测Java和PHP Web应用程序中的反序列化和对象注入漏洞。此外，该研究还介绍了首个反序列化测试环境，可以用于测试反序列化漏洞检测工具和教育目的。这些工具易于扩展，而且据我们所知，它们是第一个实现这种功能组合的工具，将跨越互补功能的综合优势融为一体，能够激发更多的研究，并有助于开发更多功能丰富的解决方案。

本文综述了ObjectMap反序列化和对象注入漏洞检测工具的开发。尽管在解决Web应用程序中的序列化漏洞问题方面已经有了一些尝试，但仍然没有统一的解决方案来检测实现无关的漏洞。为解决这个问题，研究提出了ObjectMap，一个可扩展的工具，用于检测Java和PHP Web应用程序中的反序列化和对象注入漏洞。在此基础上，该研究还介绍了首个反序列化测试环境，以测试反序列化漏洞检测工具和教育目的。这些工具具有易于扩展的特点，并且结合了跨度互补的功能，能够引起更多的研究并促进更丰富的解决方案的开发。总之，研究为Web应用程序中的反序列化漏洞问题提供了一种新方法，并为相关研究提供了有趣的方向和思路。

总结下段文字并生成一段文献综述。

Memory corruption vulnerabilities that lead to control-flow hijacking attacks are a common problem for binary executables and such attacks are known for more than two decades. Over the last few years, especially code reuse attacks attracted a lot of attention. In such attacks, an adversary does not need to inject her own code during the exploitation phase, but she reuses existing code fragments (so called gadgets) to build a code chain that performs malicious computations on her behalf. Return-oriented programming (ROP) is a well-known technique that bypasses many existing defenses. Surprisingly, code reuse attacks are also a viable attack vector against web applications.

In this paper, we study code reuse attacks in the context of PHP-based web applications. We analyze how PHP object injection (POI) vulnerabilities can be exploited via property-oriented programming (POP) and perform a systematic analysis of available gadgets in common PHP applications. Furthermore, we introduce an automated approach to statically detect POI vulnerabilities in object-oriented PHP code. Our approach is also capable of generating POP chains in an automated way. We implemented a prototype of the proposed approach and evaluated it with 10 well-known applications. Overall, we detected 30 new POI vulnerabilities and 28 new gadget chains.

这段文章讨论了内存损坏漏洞，以及在这些漏洞中使用代码重用的攻击方式，尤其是返回导向编程（ROP）技术。此外，文章还提出了一种针对Web应用程序的代码重用攻击方法。具体来说，文章分析了如何通过POP利用PHP对象注入漏洞，并对常见的PHP应用程序中的可用gadget进行了系统分析。文章还引入了一种自动化方法，可以静态检测基于对象的PHP代码中的POI漏洞，同时也能够自动生成POP链。研究人员应用该方法的原型并在10个知名应用程序上进行了评估，共发现了30个新的POI漏洞和28个新的gadget链。

本文综述了一项针对PHP Web应用程序中的代码重用攻击的研究。尽管代码重用攻击主要是针对二进制可执行文件，但该研究表明，这种攻击方式也可以用于Web应用程序中，特别是PHP Web应用程序。研究人员发现，通过POP和gadget，攻击者可以利用POI漏洞来进行代码重用攻击。为了解决这个问题，该研究提出了一种自动化方法来检测和生成POP链，以及检测POI漏洞。该方法已实现原型，并在10个知名Web应用程序上进行了测试，发现了新的漏洞和gadget链。这项研究表明了代码重用攻击对于Web应用程序的危害性，提供了一种新的检测POI漏洞的方法，并为该领域的进一步研究提供了新的方向。

翻译为中文。By reading the above literature, we can find that the current identification for blackmail websites can be mainly based on visual features and text features, and there are various classification methods for text and images, and most of the current research is based on a single feature or applying a single method for classification and identification. Inspired by the second literature, we can combine image and text features and combine the current research on text classification and image classification based on deep learning, which has outstanding performance in this field, to improve the accuracy of recognition and classification. Through the third article, we can apply collaborative training algorithm to improve the generalization of the model and optimize the model.
通过阅读上述文献，我们可以发现目前对于勒索网站的识别主要基于视觉特征和文本特征，并且有各种文本和图像分类方法，大部分现有研究是基于单一特征或应用单一方法进行分类和识别。受到第二篇文献的启发，我们可以将图像和文本特征结合起来，并结合目前基于深度学习的文本分类和图像分类研究，在这一领域有着杰出表现，以提高识别和分类的准确性。通过第三篇文章，我们可以应用协同训练算法来提高模型的泛化性能并优化模型。

翻译为中文。Through the analysis of the current research status of the detection of blackmail websites at home and abroad, the detection correct rate using single modal recognition is not high, the pure image detection method has limitations for specific web pages, the robustness is not strong, and the survival cycle of online blackmail websites is short, and the existing labeled data set is small, in response to the above existing problems, we propose to introduce more information in the training process, through multimodal features, adding web page screenshots OCR extracted text content, combined with the integrated algorithm, using semi-supervised collaborative training, the process of identifying and classifying the blackmail websites takes multimodal features identification.
Combined with the above analysis, we propose a method for identifying blackmail websites based on OCR multimodal features, and the main process is as follows: OCR technology is used to extract the text in web screenshots to solve the problem of insufficient utilization of text information, and combining the current outstanding performance of deep learning-based text classification and image classification research in this field, we choose the deep learning-based classifier, a labeled sample set is established to train image classifiers and text classifiers to solve the problem of low recognition accuracy caused by a single modality, and a semi-supervised collaborative training method is used to enrich the sample data The model generalization is improved. The methods involved in this study are: image classification, OCR, text classification, and collaborative training.
通过对国内外勒索网站检测研究现状的分析，单模态识别的检测正确率不高，纯图像检测方法对特定网页的适应性具有局限性，鲁棒性不强，在线勒索网站的生存周期较短，已有的标注数据

interactionPattern.rationale: The human asks the AI to perform specific tasks, and the AI provides responses.

powerDynamics.rationale: The human initiates tasks and directs the AI to perform specific actions.

emotionalTone.rationale: The conversation is task-focused with no emotional language.

engagementStyle.rationale: The human provides commands for the AI to execute, with iterative requests.

knowledgeExchange.rationale: The AI is asked to perform tasks that require specific skills, such as summarization and translation.

conversationPurpose.rationale: The human seeks specific outputs from the AI, such as summaries and translations.

topicDepth.rationale: The tasks involve moderate exploration of topics through summarization and translation.

turnTaking.rationale: The conversation consists of alternating turns with similar lengths.

humanRole.rationale: The human seeks information and directs the AI to perform tasks.

evidence.quote: PHP对象注入（POI）漏洞是一种安全批次

aiRole.rationale: The AI provides expert information and performs tasks as directed.
